reason: Agent successfully received message and responded with correct answer "4" to the math question
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent application displaying "Your Agents" list
Found "QA-20260513-201128-qzfl" agent in the sidebar and clicked it — Agent page opened with agent name displayed at the top and status showing "idle"
Verified agent status — Status indicator confirmed as "idle" which meets the requirement (running or idle)
Clicked on the message input field — Input field became active and ready for text entry
Typed the message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message text was successfully entered into the input field
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent and a new session "Math Basics Question Session" was created in the sidebar; agent status changed to "working"
Waited for agent response — Agent processed the request and responded within approximately 1 second with the answer "4"
Verified response contains "4" — The agent's response is clearly displayed as "4" in the chat window, confirming the correct mathematical answer to 2+2
